query:
SELECT tc.octaneCustomerId, tc.octaneName, tc.smiletelCustomerId, 
       c.name as smiletelName,
       COUNT(ts.id) as serviceCount
FROM tiab_customers tc
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = tc.smiletelCustomerId
LEFT JOIN tiab_services ts ON ts.octaneCustomerId = tc.octaneCustomerId
WHERE tc.octaneName NOT LIKE '%Zambrero%'
GROUP BY tc.octaneCustomerId, tc.octaneName, tc.smiletelCustomerId, c.name
ORDER BY tc.octaneName;
